name: Bull Time Shooter
description: A fast-paced action shooter where bulls are the enemy and survival depends on quick reflexes and precise aim. Waves of enraged bulls charge relentlessly, forcing players to shoot, dodge, and reposition constantly. Each encounter escalates in intensity, testing awareness, timing, and accuracy. Web Dev https://www.crazygamesfree.com/ With simple controls and nonstop pressure, the game delivers pure arcade chaos, rewarding skillful movement and smart target prioritization as the battlefield fills with charging horns and thunderous momentum.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
